FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Class MenuFlyout

Namespace
FluentGpu.Controls
Assembly
FluentGpu.Controls.dll

Builds the popup body for a dropdown menu — a vertical list of command rows (each Role = MenuItem). Selecting a row runs its command and closes the overlay. Used by DropDownButton / SplitButton / ToggleSplitButton / MenuBar / TimePicker. The host's FlyoutSurface already supplies the acrylic backdrop, 1px flyout stroke, OverlayCornerRadius, elevation shadow and the (0,2,0,2) presenter padding — this returns INNER content only.

public static class MenuFlyout
Inheritance
object
MenuFlyout
Inherited Members

object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
object.ToString()

Fields

PartItem

EVERY command/toggle/radio/sub-menu row — ONE modifier restyles all rows (popup-built each open, not recycled). Owned: Role, TabIndex, OnClick, OnKeyDown (roving), OnHoverMove (cascade bookkeeping), OnRealized (row-node capture, chained), Children (the check/icon/label/accelerator/chevron columns).

public const string PartItem = "Item"

Field Value

string

PartPresenter

The items column inside the viewport (WinUI ItemsPresenter). Owned: OnCharInput (first-letter jump), Children (the rows + cascade timers).

public const string PartPresenter = "Presenter"

Field Value

string

PartScrollViewer

The scrollable viewport (WinUI MenuFlyoutPresenterScrollViewer) — a ScrollEl, so style it via the generic map: Parts.Set<ScrollEl>(MenuFlyout.PartScrollViewer, s => s with { MaxHeight = … }). Owned: Content (the items column), ContentSized.

public const string PartScrollViewer = "ScrollViewer"

Field Value

string

PartSeparator

A separator row (pure chrome — no owned props).

public const string PartSeparator = "Separator"

Field Value

string

Properties

SubMenuShowDelayMs

Sub-menu hover-open AND delay-close interval — WinUI CascadingMenuHelper reads the user's HKCU MenuShowDelay, defaulting to DefaultMenuShowDelay = 400ms (MenuFlyout_Partial.h:13; CascadingMenuHelper.cpp:93-95 fallback, :439/:508 open/close timer intervals). The platform pump writes the live registry value into SystemParams at startup; headless stays 400.

public static float SubMenuShowDelayMs { get; }

Property Value

float

Methods

Build(IReadOnlyList<MenuFlyoutItem>, Action, float, TemplateParts?) 

public static Element Build(IReadOnlyList<MenuFlyoutItem> items, Action close, float minWidth = 96, TemplateParts? parts = null)

Parameters

items IReadOnlyList<MenuFlyoutItem>
close Action
minWidth float
parts TemplateParts

Returns

Element

Build(IReadOnlyList<MenuFlyoutItem>, Action, float, Action<int>?, TemplateParts?)

onNavigate: Left(-1)/Right(+1) pressed while the menu is open and the focused row is not a sub-menu boundary — MenuBar uses it to move between adjacent open menus (MenuBarItem.cpp:205-228 OnPresenterKeyDown → OpenFlyoutFrom).

public static Element Build(IReadOnlyList<MenuFlyoutItem> items, Action close, float minWidth, Action<int>? onNavigate, TemplateParts? parts = null)

Parameters

items IReadOnlyList<MenuFlyoutItem>
close Action
minWidth float
onNavigate Action<int>
parts TemplateParts

Returns

Element
FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
